description: Phase3-B25f: Abandon SSE approach for qwen3 after 10 consecutive failures (#363-#375). Switch to JSON error response. Content-Type: application/json instead of text/event-stream. Browser will NOT try to parse as SSE. Goal: at minimum stop the infinite spinner; ideally show error or warning text.

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: 11th attempt (NEW APPROACH). Check: (1) Is the spinner still infinite or does it stop? (2) Does any error message appear? (3) Does the warning text appear in any form? (4) Response headers should show Content-Type: application/json. The body is {"code":"content_filtered","message":"WARNING_TEXT"}.
services.notes: STRATEGY CHANGE: After 10 SSE injection failures, switched to simple JSON error response. Template now uses application/json, Connection: close, with proper Content-Length. No chunked encoding, no SSE. Reloaded at 19:01 KST.

notes: If spinner stops (even with error UI), this is a SUCCESS — qwen3 becomes Tier 1.5 (block confirmed, error UI). If warning text appears, even better — Tier 1.
